narrative:
Taylor Creek (precinct in Hardin County) has 399 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.6 percentage points.
